title: Project Metadata, Python Packaging, Entry Points, Plugins, and Clean Installs · Guided Program Studio
summary: A civic-publishing pair incrementally builds installed reproducible static-site command from original fixed content fixtures while retaining earlier Python, Git, HTML, CSS, URL, accessibility, security, determinism, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of installed reproducible static-site command while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Declare build backend, project metadata, Python bounds, dependencies, optional groups, entry point, package data, license, and version source in pyproject.toml.
Expose an import-safe console script with argument parsing, status codes, stdout and stderr contracts, help, version, and module execution parity.
Load packaged templates, schemas, and default assets through supported resource APIs rather than current working directory assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Pyproject Metadata
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop publishing team handles case 4098 during an offline-first field documentation build. Build deterministic Python evidence to verify inspected package artifacts, clean command installs, resources, and plugin limits; preserve source spans, Unicode policy, trust classification, route base, contextual encoding, diagnostics, and accessibility decisions; then delete a source and change a shared layout, then compare incremental and clean artifact digests. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-clean-install-c7spg1
# Competency: ssg-clean-install.
# Case 4976: a large technical reference incremental rebuild.
# Operating constraint: retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity.
# Changed case: insert malformed nested delimiters and retain later valid content with a located diagnostic.
def evidence_ssg_clean_install_c7spg1(artifacts: int = 2, inspected: int = 2, clean_installs: int = 3, command_smokes: int = 3, unsafe_plugins: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_c7spg1 = "c7spg1-1gps7c-4976"
    assert evidence_variant_c7spg1
    evidence_axes_c7spg1 = (
        "readerc7spg1",
        "source4976",
        "parse1gps7c",
        "routec7spg14976",
        "artifact4976c7spg1",
        "recovery1gps7c4976",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_c7spg1)) == 6
    if artifacts != 2 or inspected < 0:
        return False, inspected, "artifact-shape"
    if inspected != artifacts:
        return False, inspected, "artifact-inspection"
    if clean_installs < 2 or command_smokes != clean_installs:
        return False, command_smokes, "clean-install"
    if unsafe_plugins > 0:
        return False, unsafe_plugins, "plugin-boundary"
    assert inspected == artifacts
    return True, command_smokes, "installed-generator"
